name: GoTo Group Gojek Indonesia Super App API
what_it_does: GoTo Group Gojek Indonesia super app REST API for merchants, restaurants, and technology partners to integrate with GoFood (food delivery), GoPay (digital wallet), GoShop, GoMart, and GoSend logistics across Indonesia and limited Southeast Asian markets — part of the GoTo Group (Gojek + Tokopedia merger) serving 50M+ monthly transacting users in Indonesia. Enables AI agents to manage GoFood merchant operations for Indonesian food delivery automation, handle GoPay payment processing for digital wallet checkout automation, access GoSend for on-demand courier automation, retrieve merchant analytics for business performance automation, manage menu catalog for GoFood restaurant automation, handle payment settlement for financial reconciliation automation, access loyalty program for GoPoints integration automation, retrieve GoMart for grocery fulfillment automation, manage promotional campaign for Gojek advertising automation, and integrate Gojek with Indonesian e-commerce, food, and logistics platforms for end-to-end Indonesian super app automation.
use_cases: Accepting GoPay digital wallet payments from Indonesian consumers for merchant checkout automation agents
Managing GoFood restaurant menu and receiving delivery orders for Indonesian food platform automation agents
Integrating GoSend same-day courier for e-commerce fulfillment automation agents in Indonesia
Accessing merchant sales analytics for Indonesian business performance reporting automation agents
not_for: Markets outside Indonesia primarily (Gojek has limited presence in Vietnam, Thailand, Singapore but Indonesia-dominant)
Consumer-facing ride booking apps (Gojek API is for merchant and technology partners only)
Enterprise B2B logistics at scale without Gojek partner agreement (Gojek is consumer-marketplace focused)
best_when: A merchant, restaurant, or technology platform in Indonesia wanting AI agents to integrate GoPay, GoFood, or GoSend into e-commerce, food delivery, or logistics operations through Gojek's Indonesian super app ecosystem.
avoid_when: GOTO PLATFORM TRANSITION: Gojek merged with Tokopedia to form GoTo Group (IDX:GOTO); automated independent Gojek assumption should monitor for platform consolidation affecting API availability. GOPAY IS SEPARATE ECOSYSTEM FROM GOPAY LATER: GoPay (wallet) and GoPayLater (BNPL) are different products with separate integrations; automated unified GoPay assumption creates product confusion; automated must integrate correct GoPay product for use case. INDONESIA-FOCUSED COVERAGE: Gojek's strongest coverage is Indonesia; automated pan-SEA Gojek coverage assumption creates limited merchant availability in Vietnam/Thailand/Singapore vs. Indonesia. MERCHANT API REQUIRES PARTNERSHIP: Gojek merchant APIs require partnership agreement; automated self-service key assumption creates no access.

auth.notes: Gojek uses OAuth 2.0 for merchant and partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Jakarta, Indonesia HQ. Founded 2010 by Nadiem Makarim. IDX:GOTO (merged Gojek+Tokopedia, IPO 2022). Backed by Alibaba, SoftBank, Google, Facebook, Temasek. Products: GoRide/GoCar, GoFood, GoPay, GoShop, GoMart, GoSend, GoMed, GoPlay. 50M+ monthly transacting users. 2M+ driver-partners. Competes with Grab in SEA. Indonesia-dominant super app. OJK (Bank Indonesia) licensed for GoPay.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved partners; production requires GoTo/Gojek partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: GoPay: transaction fee; GoFood commission: 20-30%; GoSend: per-delivery; varies by product and volume
pricing.notes: Jakarta ID. IDX:GOTO. OJK licensed. Per-transaction/commission. Partnership required. Indonesia focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order webhooks near real-time; payment APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: GOPAY REQUIRES CONSUMER APP AUTHENTICATION: GoPay payments require consumer authorization in Gojek app via deeplink; automated server-side GoPay payment creates integration failure; automated checkout must redirect to GoPay authorization flow

GOTO GROUP PLATFORM COMPLEXITY: GoTo combines Gojek and Tokopedia with shared infrastructure; automated assumption of fully separate Gojek platform creates confusion with Tokopedia commerce integrations; automated must confirm correct GoTo product API for use case
MERCHANT PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Gojek merchant API requires GoTo partnership agreement and technical certification; automated developer self-signup creates no merchant API access
BAHASA INDONESIA DOCUMENTATION: Some Gojek developer documentation is in Bahasa Indonesia; automated non-Indonesian team integration may require translation support

GOFOOD ORDER REAL-TIME REQUIRED: GoFood orders require near-instant confirmation; automated delayed processing creates order cancellation and GoFood merchant score impact; automated must maintain real-time webhook handler
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indonesia super app. OJK, Bank Indonesia, PDP Law, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. ID. Consumer payment and order data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indonesia super app. OJK, PDP Law. OAuth2. ID. Consumer payment and delivery data.
